name: @juicesharp/rpiv-web-tools
description_en: Pi extension. Web search and fetch for the model with pluggable providers (Brave, Tavily, Serper, Exa, You.com, Jina, Firecrawl, Perplexity, SearXNG, Ollama).
description_zh: Pi 扩展。模型的网页搜索和获取功能，支持可插拔的提供商（Brave、Tavily、Serper、Exa、You.com、Jina、Firecrawl、Perplexity、SearXNG、Ollama）。
